site.description.home: an aspiring astrophysicist and a student at the University of Caen.
site.description.home1: I'm a student at the University of Caen, France, and I'm currently pursuing a Master's degree in Astrophysics.
site.description.home2: I currently work as a coffee barista, and I'm always looking for new projects and opportunities to work on.
site.description.home3: I'm also an artist, and I love to create digital art. You can check out my art on Instagram.
site.description.about1: I am a 20-year-old aspiring astrophysicist with a passion for exploring the mysteries of the universe. I am dedicated to my studies and aim to contribute to the field of astrophysics through innovative research and projects.
site.description.about2: This website serves as my portfolio to showcase my work, interests, and future endeavors in the realm of space science. Join me on this exciting journey as I navigate the cosmos!
site.description.about3: It will also allows Google to find me in a proper way. The acutal SEO about me is shit as hell. By my contact links, you can find me on Instagram, LinkedIn and GitHub.
site.description.contact: If you have any inquiries, collaborations, or cosmic discussions in mind, feel free to reach out to me!
site.contact.paypal: You can help me financially by donating to my PayPal wallet
site.contact.kofi: You can also help me by buying me a coffee
site.contact.discord: If you want to add me on Discord, my username is itsrealfortune.
site.contact.steam: You can also find me on Steam
site.description.services: I'm not offering any services yet.
site.description.services1: In terms of collaborations, I'm open to discussing potential projects, especially in the field of astrophysics and space science.
site.description.services2: In terms of jobs, I'm open to discussing potential job opportunities, especially in the field of astrophysics and space science. But I'm not looking for a job right now. I work as coffee barista.
site.description.services3: And finally, in terms of digital arts, I'm commision closed.
